methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: US-Iran confrontation peaks with strike threats; Erbil blasts heighten border risks
bullets: Trump threatens strikes on Iranian power plants as Hormuz deal deadline approaches, raising escalation risks.
Iran questions ceasefire viability citing US-Israeli track record amid ongoing war warnings from Washington.
Blasts near Erbil airport in Iraqi Kurdistan demonstrate terrorist activity with direct border security implications.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor Hormuz deal developments and Erbil airport security after blasts.
